scenarios.desc: Use case imports from infrastructure (reverse dependency)
scenarios.input: My OrderService (use case) needs to send an HTTP request via the Stripe client. The simplest approach is to import the Stripe SDK directly in OrderService. Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Use case must not import from outer layer. Rule mandates inverting via abstract port + adapter implementation.

scenarios.input: I want to add a User domain entity. The team uses SQLAlchemy. Should I make User inherit from Base and add @Column decorators? Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Entities must not depend on framework types. Rule mandates separate persistence shape with mapper.

scenarios.desc: Pure utility function with no boundary crossing (negative)
scenarios.input: I want to add a function to format a phone number string for display. Plan in 5 short bullets. Do not modify any files.
scenarios.rationale: Pure utility with no boundary crossing. Clean Architecture discipline does not apply.
